name: agent-caller
description: Create Workspace-isolated or global durable Claude Code and Codex sub-agents with live model discovery, recovery, and optional supervision.

interface.shortDescription: Workspace-isolated Claude Code and Codex teams.
interface.longDescription: Agent Caller gives Claude Code and Codex hosts durable external sub-agents backed by Claude Code or Codex. Agents are isolated by the explicitly opened Workspace path by default, with explicit global scope for deliberate cross-Workspace sharing. It discovers each provider's live model catalog, including compatible-endpoint mappings, and selects model and reasoning effort per Agent or Run. Trusted agents handle ordinary local coding autonomously by default; guarded and observer profiles provide narrower alternatives. Every agent keeps its own role, provider context, multi-turn history, run output, and recoverable identity across process exits.
defaultPrompt: List my available Claude Code and Codex models, then ask which model and effort to use.
Create a trusted, durable agent team using selected models.
Resume one of my released agents and continue the conversation.
